survivors.name: El Doctor

abilities: Triage — Priority heals the lowest HP ally — restores significant HP to whoever needs it most
Blank Eye Diagnosis — Scans an enemy with those glowing eyes — reveals stats and applies a DEF debuff
Emergency Extraction — Pulls an ally out of immediate danger — repositions them and grants a temporary shield

survivors.name: Mr. Cool, The Feral Operative
survivors.traits: Gray, Dark sunglasses, stitches across face, action hero demeanor, agent badge
abilities: Cold Precision — Calculated strikes that target enemy weak points — bonus damage on focused attacks
KillaSpaceGuard Protocol — Activates deep-space operative training, enhancing reflexes and tactical awareness
Shades of Death — The sunglasses aren't just cool — they provide targeting data, threat assessment, and intimidation in one package

survivors.name: Baron Von Fluffington
survivors.traits: Beige, Military pilot cap with red band, aviator goggles, aristocratic bearing
abilities: Perfect Cover — Decades of flawless deception
Total Recall — Remembers every detail for intelligence
Pilot Skills — Expert aviator (Flight callsign: The Baron)
Social Manipulation — Knows exactly what people want to hear

survivors.name: Red Eye, The Helper
survivors.traits: Metallic / None, Red eyes, metal jaw, mechanical frame
abilities: Iron Jaw — Metal jaw delivers devastating bite force
Red Eye Targeting — Enhanced visual targeting and threat assessment
Mechanical Endurance — Doesn't tire, doesn't slow, doesn't stop
Helper Protocol — Dr. Fomo's base programming — assist, protect, serve

survivors.name: The Ancient Shield, Ursoth's Heir
survivors.traits: Blue, Blue fur, Ursoth-style ancient armor
abilities: Ursoth's Stand — Plants feet and becomes nearly immovable
Ancient Plate — Armor absorbs supernatural and physical damage
Brave Aura — Nearby allies feel courage — fear effects weakened
Blue Bastion — Defensive stance that creates a safe zone behind him

survivors.name: The Blue Man, Heff, Mellow Blue
survivors.traits: Sky Blue, Red velvet smoking robe, perpetually blowing smoke rings, lives in a leather armchair
abilities: Strategic Genius — Sees solutions invisible to others
Calm Under Fire — Nothing rattles him
Reading Bears — Knows what you'll do before you do
Patience — Waits for the perfect moment—always

survivors.name: The Grump, Spiral Eyes, Loyal One
survivors.traits: Dark Brown, Spiral eyes, sharp teeth, aggressive expression, gray turtleneck sweater
abilities: Intimidation — That face ends confrontations before they start
Spiral Stare — The eyes are... unsettling
Unexpected Kindness — Generosity that catches people off guard
Fierce Protection — Don't threaten his friends

survivors.name: The Scarecrow, Sack Head
survivors.traits: Dark brown, Dark brown fur, burlap mask, scythe, baby Fire Suzuika companion
abilities: Burlap Dread — Mask induces primal fear — scarecrow effect
Scythe Harvest — Oversized scythe with supernatural cutting power
Fire Suzuika Bond — Baby alien companion breathes fire on command
Scarecrow's Field — Area of influence where enemies feel watched, hunted

survivors.name: The Bee Cub

Stinger Rush — Dive-bombs an enemy at full speed — quick strike that ignores armor

survivors.name: The Ghost, Ice Cold

abilities: Camo Cloak — Activates natural camo fur pattern to blend with surroundings — near-invisibility for ambush or escape
Cyborg Targeting — Visor locks onto targets, granting enhanced accuracy and the ability to identify weak points
Ice Grill Intimidation — Flashes the ice grills with a cold stare — chance to freeze an enemy in place with sheer menace

survivors.name: Sugar Skull, The Gummy Bomber

abilities: Rocket Rush — Backpack propels him at terrifying speed
Gummy Regeneration — Purple gummy body reforms after damage
Sugar Skull Scream — Candyskull mask amplifies a disorienting shriek
Mace Spin — Uses rocket backpack to spin the clown's mace like a blender

survivors.name: The Stitched Captain, Crystal Skull

abilities: Crystal Clarity — Forehead crystal grants tactical foresight in battle
Captain's Command — Rallies allies with authority that transcends death
Stitched Resilience — Reattaches damaged limbs — crude but effective
Undead March — Tireless, relentless advance — zombies don't need rest

survivors.name: Sad Cory, The Hopeful One
survivors.traits: Bright Red, White hoodie/outfit, melancholic expression, looks like he needs a hug
abilities: Emotional Intelligence — Deeply understands others' feelings
Approachability — Bears naturally want to talk to him
Sad Boy Aura — Makes others want to help him
Hope Maintenance — Keeps believing despite evidence

survivors.name: The Tarlands Chief, Ice Grills
survivors.traits: Black, Black fur, ice grills, dizzy eyes, caveman pelt, Chief of Tarlands tribe near Cinder Gulf
abilities: Primal Rage — Unfiltered berserker fury — stronger than modern Crusher
Ice Grill Bite — Frozen teeth deliver devastating, frostburning bites
Tarlands Endurance — Survival near Cinder Gulf bred supernatural toughness
Dizzy Spiral — Spiral eyes disorient enemies who make eye contact

survivors.name: Pixel Blade, Rainbow Grin
survivors.traits: Pink (pixel), Pink pixel body, rainbow grills, ice sword
abilities: Ice Blade — Frost sword freezes targets on contact
Pixel Phase — Digital body can briefly become intangible
Rainbow Flash — Grills emit blinding light burst
Cuddle Trap — Appears harmless — enemies underestimate fatally

survivors.name: The Bone Horror

abilities: Skull Crush — Massive bite attack with those exposed teeth — high single-target damage with armor pierce

Undead Tenacity — Passive — the first hit that would KO him is survived with 1 HP instead

survivors.name: Grills, Donnie, The Smile
survivors.traits: Beige, Rainbow grills (multicolored teeth), stitches covering body, button eyes
abilities: Soul Reading — Can sense a person's true nature and intentions
Emotional Support — Natural ability to lift spirits and provide comfort
Stitched Resilience — Body can be repaired; hard to permanently damage

survivors.name: The Quartermaster
survivors.traits: Dark Brown, Calm round eyes, white guayabera shirt, warm steady expression
abilities: Steady Hand — Reliable precision strike — consistent damage that never misses, never crits, always lands

Rally the Crew — Boosts entire team's morale — all allies gain ATK and DEF buff for one turn

survivors.name: The Duke, Black Heart
survivors.traits: Black, Black fur, heart eyes, cowboy hat, bulletproof vest, bandana
abilities: Quick Draw — Fastest draw in the Den
Heart Lock — Heart eyes can track a target's heartbeat
Bulletproof Grit — Vest + willpower = keeps standing
Duke's Honor — Won't fight the unarmed. Will disarm the armed.

survivors.name: Fin, The Commander, Furrious
survivors.traits: Green, Military attire, command presence, green fur, battle-hardened demeanor
abilities: Tactical Mastery — Reads battlefields like others read books
Command Presence — Bears instinctively follow his lead
Primal Connection — Primal Kard grants access to ancient power
Adaptive Strategy — Adjusts plans in real-time as conditions shift

survivors.name: Junior, The Nephew
survivors.traits: Peach, Peach fur, Dr. Fomo's nephew, insecure but brilliant
abilities: Fomo Bloodline — Inherited genius — activates under extreme stress

Uncle's Legacy — Access to Dr. Fomo's notes and half-finished inventions

survivors.name: Freddie, The Rainbow Slasher

abilities: Mask On — FreddyBear mask triggers combat persona

Scarf Snare — Purple scarf used as binding weapon

survivors.name: The Cadet

Something From Nothing — Once per battle, creates an improvised solution from available materials — trap, weapon, or escape route

Puppet Strings — Moves in impossible ways — joints aren't where you expect

abilities: Blind Fury — Enhanced senses compensate — sound, smell, vibration
Berserker Rage — Enters destructive frenzy, ignores pain
Grump Aura — His bad mood is somehow contagious — enemies lose morale
Scarf Whip — Purple scarf used as improvised weapon in close quarters

abilities: Spiral Vision — Eyes can induce trance states in others

Psychedelic Aura — Reality gets weird around him

Honey Courage — Radiates bravery — steadies allies around her

survivors.name: The House, Green Dealer

survivors.name: The Undead Berserker
survivors.traits: Purple (decayed), One red eye, torn/chewed ears, exposed stuffing, zombie appearance

Mutant Frenzy — Unleashes a flurry of attacks, sacrificing accuracy for raw damage output

abilities: Horror Sight — Can look directly at Killaverse horrors without damage

Veteran Instincts — Survived the early "Primal" wars; combat experienced

survivors.name: The Skull, Bonehead, The Cursed One

Intimidation — The grin is DEEPLY unsettling

Intimidation — One look ends arguments

survivors.name: The B Team
survivors.traits: Tan/Peach, Navy bulletproof vest, white arm bandages, perpetual scowl

survivors.name: The Death Knell, Bone Crown
survivors.traits: Purple (zombie), Bone through head, exposed ribs, unhinged jaw
abilities: Death Knell Roar — Unhinged jaw releases sonic devastation
Undead Endurance — Cannot be stopped by conventional damage
Bone Crown Resonance — The skull-bone channels necrotic energy
Rib Cage Trap — Exposed ribs can ensnare weapons and limbs

survivors.name: Sweet P, Uncle, The Old Bear, OG
survivors.traits: Red/Orange, Tan cowboy hat, pink fur-lined coat with "Sweet P" in rhinestones on the back
abilities: Institutional Memory — Remembers everything and everyone
Street Wisdom — Seen every scam, every trick, every play
Mediation — Keeps the family from killing each other
The Old Ways — Knows how things were done—and why

survivors.name: The Skeptic, Pink Panic, "That Guy"
survivors.traits: Bright Pink, Mouth agape in constant disbelief, looks like he just witnessed something horrifying (he probably did)
abilities: Skeptic's Eye — Immediately spots flaws in any plan
Deadpan Delivery — Devastating sarcasm
Reluctant Competence — Complains but executes perfectly
Survival Instinct — Paranoia keeps him alive

survivors.name: Zipper Mouth, The Silent
survivors.traits: Red, Red fur, leather mask, zipper mouth, completely silent
abilities: Absolute Silence — Makes no sound — not breathing, not footsteps, nothing
Zipper Seal — The mouth seal suppresses all vocal-based attacks against him
Leather Mask Focus — Enhanced concentration from sensory limitation
Red Ghost — Moves unseen despite vivid fur color — silence overrides visibility

survivors.name: The Masked Blade, Demon Slash
survivors.traits: Red, White demon half-mask, bulletproof vest, dual katanas
abilities: Twin Fang Style — Dual katana technique unique to Kenjōkai warriors
Demon Mask Focus — The mask channels battle-rage into cold precision
Bulletproof Resilience — Shrugs off ranged attacks to close distance
Kenjōkai Discipline — Enhanced endurance through warrior meditation
